A calm, correct page

This paragraph sits in a centered prose column with a deliberate maximum width, which is a readability feature rather than a layout defect, so the width-utilization heuristic should leave it alone.

There is no horizontal overflow, every text block clears the WCAG AA contrast bar with margin, and there are no side-by-side siblings that could disagree about their heights.

A clean first pass is a valid result: the checker should report an empty violations array and exit zero.
